en-US.name: Marine Skill
en-US.summary: Get marine weather, tide predictions, and NOAA buoy data via Alexa.
en-US.description: Marine Skill provides real-time marine weather conditions, tide predictions, and NOAA buoy observations. Ask for current wind speed, wave heights, high and low tide times, and coastal forecast zone reports.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask marine skill what is the marine weather
Alexa, ask marine skill when is high tide

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Enable the skill and say 'Alexa, open marine skill'. Ask for marine weather or tide times.
